name: tally-mcp-server
description: Tally Prime MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server implementation to feed Tally Prime ERP data to popular LLM like Claude, ChatGPT supporting MCP

scripts.build:binary: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/index.mts --compile --outfile dist-bin/tally-mcp
scripts.build:binary:win: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/index.mts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist-bin/tally-mcp-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:binary:mac-arm: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/index.mts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist-bin/tally-mcp-mac-arm64
scripts.build:binary:mac-x64: npm run build:embeds && bun build src/index.mts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist-bin/tally-mcp-mac-x64
scripts.build:binary:all: npm run build:binary:win && npm run build:binary:mac-arm && npm run build:binary:mac-x64
